name: Censys Python SDK (Internet Asset Discovery)
pricing_notes: Free: 250 queries/month; Basic $149/mo; Teams $499/mo; Enterprise custom

auth.notes: API ID + Secret from censys.io account

performance.notes: REST API; pagination for large result sets; rate limited on free tier

agent_readiness.notes: Internet asset discovery and attack surface management. from censys.search import CensysHosts. h = CensysHosts(). for host in h.search('services.port: 443 and autonomous_system.name: AMAZON'): print(host). View specific host: h.view('1.2.3.4'). Certificates: CensysCerts. Censys ASM API for continuous asset monitoring. Certstream competitor. Banner grabbing data. IP geolocation. CVE lookup by host. Passive reconnaissance without scanning targets directly.

gotchas: Data freshness varies (not real-time, regular scan cycles)
Pricing escalates quickly for large-scale use
best_when: External attack surface discovery (find internet-exposed assets)
Identifying exposed services in IP ranges or org ASN
avoid_when: Internal network discovery (Censys is internet-facing only)
summary: Censys Python SDK queries Censys's internet scan database for attack surface discovery. CensysHosts().search('services.port: 443 and autonomous_system.name: AMAZON') for passive recon. View host details, certificates, banners. ASM API for continuous monitoring. Passive reconnaissance without active scanning. Free tier limited (250 queries/mo). Academic pricing available for researchers.
